events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: NM cable within 1¼ inches of stud face without nail plate. NEC 300.4 requires protection of cables installed parallel to framing members by keeping them at least 1-1/4 inches from the edge of the stud, or by installing a nail plate. If NM is within 1¼ in. of stud face without nail plate, that's non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium/high (potential nail penetration). Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective.
